title: Acme — Build something better
description: A clean Astro starter with i18n, content collections, GSAP, SEO, and consent-gated analytics.

hero.title: Ship a fast, multilingual site in days, not weeks.
hero.lead: Acme bundles the patterns we keep reaching for — i18n, content collections, GSAP scroll reveals, Cloudflare images, and analytics that respects consent.

features.title: Opinionated where it helps, flexible where it matters.
features.lead: Pick what you need; the pieces are decoupled.

items.title: Typed i18n
items.body: Autocomplete-friendly translations with locale-aware routing and hreflang alternates.

items.title: Content collections
items.body: Blog, authors, and categories defined with Zod — strict frontmatter, zero surprises.

items.title: GSAP scroll animations
items.body: ScrollTrigger setup that respects prefers-reduced-motion and cleans up on navigation.

items.title: Consent-gated analytics
items.body: Vanilla CookieConsent bridges to Cloudflare Zaraz and Google Consent Mode v2.

items.title: Cloudflare images
items.body: Astro <Image /> wired to Cloudflare CDN Image Transformations.

items.title: SEO that actually validates
items.body: Canonical, hreflang, OG, Twitter, JSON-LD organization + breadcrumb + article helpers.

items.q: Can I drop pieces I don't need?
items.a: Yes. Each lib module is self-contained — remove Zaraz, the cookie banner, or GSAP without touching the rest.
The default deployment and image service assume Cloudflare Pages, but you can swap the hosting target with minor tweaks.
useTranslations() infers keys from your JSON files at compile time, so unknown keys fail typecheck.

cta.title: Clone, run, customize.
cta.lead: Open the README and the docs/ folder for the full architecture tour.
cta.label: View the README
